    'models/video.py': 'Y2xhc3MgVmlkZW86CiAgICBkZWYgX19pbml0X18oc2VsZiwgdGl0bGUsIG1pbnV0ZXMpOgogICAgICAgIHNlbGYudGl0bGUgPSB0aXRsZQogICAgICAgIHNlbGYubWludXRlcyA9IG1pbnV0ZXMKCiAgICBkZWYgbGFiZWwoc2VsZik6CiAgICAgICAgcmV0dXJuIGYiVmlkZW86IHtzZWxmLnRpdGxlfSAoe3NlbGYubWludXRlc30gbWluKSIK',
